title: AssessmentOutput
description: Structured return from code-assessor agent — first code-reading stage of the workflow.

doc_path.description: Absolute path to the produced code-assessment.md.

patterns.description: Recurring patterns/idioms the new code MUST follow (e.g. 'Repository<T> for DB access', 'tracing::instrument on every service fn').

files_assessed.description: Count of source files inspected during this assessment.
